originalTitle: Dow Jones Futures: Micron, Sandisk, Google Lead AI Sell-Off, Netflix Dives Late; SpaceX Starship Launch Scrubbed
summary: The Nasdaq tumbled on Sandisk, Micron, other AI stocks, but regional banks and transports rose. SpaceX fell late as a Starship launch was scrubbed.
content: The Nasdaq tumbled on Sandisk, Micron, other AI stocks, but regional banks and transports rose. SpaceX fell late as a Starship launch was scrubbed.
chineseTitle: 道琼斯期货：美光科技、Sandisk、谷歌领衔 AI 抛售，Netflix 后期跳水； SpaceX 星舰发射受挫
chineseSummary: 桑迪斯克（Sandisk）、美光科技（Micron）和其他人工智能股票的纳斯达克指数下跌，但地区银行和运输业上涨。由于星际飞船发射被取消，SpaceX 股价下跌。
chineseContent: 桑迪斯克（Sandisk）、美光科技（Micron）和其他人工智能股票的纳斯达克指数下跌，但地区银行和运输业上涨。由于星际飞船发射被取消，SpaceX 股价下跌。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
